reviews.review_description: A shame they gave up on this game, game was the best for the genre and had so much potential. They let it brake and years later finally think about it only to get rid of the game entirely. It’s a real shame to those who bought it, if only we can get a refund.
Do we get our 10$ back if you’re taking away something we’ve paid for ??

Every card cost 1000-4000 coins but you get 250-500 per match or something. I just can't invest the time to "build a deck" it's extremely boring spamming characters that die really quickly. Would prefer more HP so each unit is significant and better balance so dragons dont stomp over you. Also some weird wobble on the table makes it pretty disorienting. Just not a decent game. Tower defender on app lab is my preference.

NEEDS MULTIPLAYER !!!!!!!! PLEASE MAKE multiplayer!!!! THIS GAME IS CLASH ROYALE 
In vr

Multiplayer and friends systems not working
Despite the nice graphics of this game but there is no strategic gaming as all you need is to drop army and troops while you can only develop them outside the battle.
Very happy

Man this game is just so relaxing and fun. Kinda reminds me of clash royale. I like how I can sit down and grab the map and pull it down to my level and if I want to stand back up I can grab it and pull it up to my height. But I won’t say anything about the troops. Get the game!! $10 you can spare for a game like this! And it’s worth it.

I bought this game because of the genre, being a clash royal player on the mobile device I like tower defence games but there is a few things missing for me with this game. The movement such as turning the battle field isn’t as fluent as some games and can be quite frustrating when you can’t stop it from moving. I like multiplayer games but unfortunately I’ve not been able to get one match up. There doesn’t seem to be an end game and hardly any skill needed with different creatures been over powered such as the dragons

reviews.review_title: Incredible depth for such a low price
reviews.review_description:
I bought the game during the holiday sale, and it has become one of my most played games so far. This game is like a combination of Clash Royale and Clash of Clans but in VR, which works surprisingly well. There are a ton of cards and avatars to unlock too, so you can make numerous combinations and original decks. The game also has a tournament system, which I haven’t tried out yet but seems to be a lot of fun. 
Regarding the playerbase, the game seems to be quite active, but on less active days/hours I have noticed that the game often pairs you up with the same 1-5 people. On weekends, this is not an issue. I have no complaints about the game and am loving it thus far.
Just a little suggestion, I think it would be great if there was a game mode with more than 2 people playing, so maybe a 2v2 team battle or even a 4 man free for all could work very well with the game’s mechanics.

I was never into these types of games but bruh this has me addicted I do hope it gets fixed with the draws also implement something for when people force close out of anger when they're losing I'd like to still get my gold and experience when somone rage quits and leaves it would be great to have various maps and some way to get shards rather than just tourneys I'd gladly buy them if I could I look forward to updates to fix the glitches and the language that the tutorial is in other than that this game is epic ad only for 10 dollars easily worth more can't wait to play competitively

This is the first game to really hook me after getting the Quest. The controls take a second to get used in terms of angling the units for optimal pathing but are otherwise quick and responsive. The gameplay is fun and the deck building is deep enough to keep me from getting bored. PvP games are a blast and it’s an easy recommendation for $10.

Was not sure what to expect, wow to be fair this has been well thought out and a very good game, bought it tonight and spent about 5 hours on it.

Looking forward to seeing new troops and what they can do.

Very tactical lots to think about, the timing of each game is spot on.

Lots of cards.  Lots of fun.  Love the different environments.  Just wish the text was a bit bigger.  Definitely more to it than a standard tug-of-war card game.  Powering up cards isn’t pay to win.  So there is decent customization without making it an endless grind.  Does take a while to unlock some cards, but it’s just gold so you can choose what you want to get.

But I can’t figure out how to play competitive to get those blue coins. Do I have to wait for another tournament to start?
there should always be the possibility to get these coins ... 
aside from that it’s a very good game. I can play with my friends and they also love it. 
Hope there‘s more to come in the future
